# FFmpeg-derived components

MIVF includes FFmpeg-derived MoFlex/Mobiclip code and supporting headers under:

- `source/moflex/decoder/`
- `source/moflex/ffmpeg_support/`

The bundled configuration identifies these components as licensed under the
GNU Lesser General Public License version 2.1 or later.

The LGPL 2.1 license text is provided in:

- `COPYING.LGPLv2.1`

FFmpeg project: https://ffmpeg.org/
